mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT f.*, p.title AS product_title, p.price AS product_price, p.status AS product_status FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
